landing.heroTitle: Turn your documents into an assistant that actually cites its sources
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your PDFs, docs, and web pages. Verba answers questions using only your content, and shows exactly where every answer came from. Add the chat widget to your site in one line.
landing.trustLine: No credit card. Your data is never used to train models.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for a document assistant
landing.featuresSubtitle: From upload to embedded widget, Verba handles the full retrieval pipeline.
landing.feature1Body: Verba retrieves the most relevant passages and answers from them only. No made-up facts, no outside knowledge.
landing.feature2Body: Each answer links back to the exact source passage, so you and your users can verify it in one click.
landing.feature3Body: PDFs, Word documents, text, Markdown, and public web pages. Verba parses, chunks, and embeds it all.
landing.feature4Body: Drop a single script tag on any website and your visitors get an instant support assistant trained on your docs.
landing.feature5Body: Ask in English, Spanish, or Portuguese and get answers in the same language, grounded in the same sources.
landing.feature6Body: Your documents are yours. We never train models on your content, and you can delete it at any time.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps from documents to a live assistant.
landing.step1Body: Add files, paste text, or point Verba at a web page. It extracts the text and splits it into searchable passages.
landing.step2Body: Each passage is embedded into a vector index so questions can be matched to meaning, not just keywords.
landing.step3Body: Chat in the dashboard or drop the widget on your site. Every answer comes with its sources.
landing.widgetTeaserTitle: A support agent for your website, in one line
landing.widgetTeaserBody: Enable the widget on any knowledge base and paste the snippet. Your visitors get grounded answers from your docs, day and night.
landing.ctaBody: Create a knowledge base, upload a few documents, and start asking. It takes a couple of minutes.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your knowledge bases.
auth.registerSubtitle: Build a document assistant in minutes.
auth.demoHint: Jump in with sample knowledge bases already loaded.

dashboard.title: Your knowledge bases
dashboard.subtitle: Each knowledge base is a set of documents your assistant can answer from.
dashboard.emptyBody: Create your first knowledge base, add a few documents, and start chatting with them.
dashboard.documents: {count, plural, =0 {No documents} one {# document} other {# documents}}
dashboard.sources: {count, plural, =0 {No passages} one {# passage} other {# passages}}
dashboard.descPlaceholder: Optional. What is this knowledge base about?
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Delete this knowledge base and all its documents? This cannot be undone.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Add the content your assistant should answer from.
documents.fileHint: PDF, DOCX, TXT, or Markdown, up to {mb} MB.
documents.dropHere: Click to choose a file or drag it here
documents.urlHint: Verba fetches the page and extracts its readable text.
documents.textPlaceholder: Paste the content you want the assistant to know...
documents.emptyBody: Upload a file, add a web page, or paste text to get started.
documents.deleteConfirm: Remove this document from the knowledge base?

chat.title: Chat
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about your documents...
chat.emptyBody: Verba answers from this knowledge base and shows the exact passages it used.
chat.noDocsBody: This knowledge base has no ready documents yet. Add one to start chatting.

settings.title: Settings
settings.widgetBody: Embed a chat bubble on any website. Visitors get answers grounded in this knowledge base.
settings.embedBody: Paste this snippet just before the closing body tag of your site.
settings.publicLinkBody: Or share the assistant directly with this link.
settings.rotateConfirm: Reset the public link? The old link and embed code will stop working.
settings.retrievalBody: Tune how many passages inform each answer.
settings.dangerBody: Permanently delete this knowledge base and every document in it.

account.title: Account
account.usageBody: Daily limits protect the shared demo quota. They reset every day.

widget.title: Ask a question
widget.unavailable: This assistant is not available right now.
